overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a wizard character exploring a dimly lit gothic potions classroom with stone walls, vaulted ceilings, and multiple fireplaces. The character walks through the atmospheric room examining worktables, shelves, and cabinets illuminated by warm firelight and wall sconces.

character turns left and walks along the fireplace wall

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and ornate mantelpiece
brass implements and pokers arranged by the fireplace
copper pots and pans hanging on the right wall
lit wall sconce providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a gothic potions classroom with the character standing before a large stone fireplace. Warm firelight illuminates brass cooking tools and copper pots as the character looks up at the wooden mantelpiece, then turns to walk along the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage corner with rubble and cabinetry

approaches the bookshelf and apothecary drawer cabinet area

agents.ego_description: walking through the left side of the room, examining a wooden wardrobe and approaching a tall bookshelf with labeled apothecary drawers

entered.detail: dark wooden wardrobe cabinet with carved details
pile of stone rubble and debris in the corner
tall wooden bookshelf filled with books and jars
cabinet with multiple small labeled drawers for ingredients
framed painting hanging on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character explores the left corner of the classroom, passing a wooden wardrobe and a pile of rubble. The scene shifts to a storage area featuring a tall bookshelf and an apothecary cabinet with labeled drawers, all lit by warm wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: central classroom with potion worktables and cauldrons

character looks up at the vaulted ceiling and hanging chandelier

large copper cauldron on a stone pedestal
ornate iron chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling
gothic stone archway leading to another area

segments.scene_description: The character moves back to the central classroom area, passing wooden worktables with iron cauldrons. The stone fireplace comes back into view from the opposite side as the character looks up at the ornate hanging chandelier and gothic vaulted ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor with display cabinet and gothic arches

events.description: moves toward the back of the room approaching a large display cabinet
character stops to examine the glass display cabinet

agents.ego_description: walking to the back of the classroom and stopping to examine a large wooden display cabinet with glass doors

entered.detail: large wooden cabinet with glass doors containing artifacts
pointed gothic archway in the back wall
large framed painting with chalk markings on it
small stone pedestal with objects on top

segments.scene_description: The character walks to the back of the classroom toward a large glass display cabinet. Passing through gothic archways, the scene becomes slightly darker as the character stops to examine the cabinet and a framed painting with chalk markings on the wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic potions classroom that transitions from the warm glow of a hearth to the dim shadows of a rear storage area. It begins before a large stone fireplace where firelight glints off brass tools and copper pots before the camera turns to follow the character along the left wall. As the movement continues into the corner, the scene shifts past a wooden wardrobe and rubble toward a storage area filled with tall bookshelves and an apothecary cabinet illuminated by wall sconces. The camera then circles back into the central room, passing iron cauldrons on wooden worktables and glancing upward at an ornate chandelier and vaulted ceiling. Finally, the view glides through gothic archways into a darker section of the room, stopping before a large glass display cabinet and a framed painting marked with chalk.
